embedding.formula: f5D(t) = sum_p (log p / sqrt p) * cos(t * log p) * r_p

rank_note: v1 = -q3 (antipodal): 6 roots span only 5D. Block C effective rank 1. G5 (5x5 via P5 projection) is the primary PD object. G6 (6x6) kept for reference — has one structural zero eigenvalue.

A.note_chavez_mcp: 100-D diagonal sequence in block_diag_sequences.A for CAILculator.

B.note_chavez_mcp: 100-D diagonal sequence in block_diag_sequences.B for CAILculator.

C.note_chavez_mcp: 100-D diagonal sequence in block_diag_sequences.C for CAILculator.

computation_3.note_long_sequences: Chavez Transform for sequences n >= 50 deferred to CAILculator MCP. See cailculator_sequences below.

computation_5.note: Full ZDTP + Chavez via CAILculator MCP. See cailculator_sequences.
